programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop
programme.desc: Dame confronts Boogie's addiction; Pep reels over book drama; Romeo's bible study unleashes demons; Briana breaks down; TJ's event occurs; Briana vs. Angela.

programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop
programme.desc: A bomb hits Angela's engagement; things backfire when Tee Tee confesses to Kristinia for spreading rumors; verbal blows are thrown; Romeo brings a sexy super model to a photoshoot and Angela gets jealous.

programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop
programme.sub-title: Sticks and Stones and Broken Thrones
programme.desc: Bow Wow re-enters Angela's life; Kristina and Briana nearly come to blows; Treach blasts Pepa over the tell-all book; Boogie faces his court date for a second DUI; a shocking pregnancy sends one heir reeling.

programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop
programme.sub-title: Yo Gotti Got the Next Date?
programme.desc: Angela opens up about her devastating breakup and the pressures of living in the spotlight; Vanessa throws a party to reunite the heirs and clear the air; Romeo gets caught up in a love triangle; Boogie's addiction takes a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop
programme.desc: Tee Tee and Briana beef over Romeo's affections; Dame enlists Master P to scare Boogie straight; Angela moves to Los Angeles for a fresh start; Romeo hopes to get close to his former flame; red flags are raised over Egypt's relationship.

programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop
programme.desc: "Game of Thrones" game night at Pepa's house spirals into fight night; Dame and Pep clash over the severity of Boogie's addiction while Briana enters to confront a nasty rumor; Angela and Romeo reunite for the first time since Angela's breakup.

programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop
programme.desc: Angela and Romeo's Orlando, Fla., getaway leads to a hotel nightcap; Briana and Pepa clash at a releasing ceremony when Pepa brings alcoholic spirits; Boogie is blind-sided when he is led to a surprise drug intervention.

programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop
programme.desc: Boogie's intervention spirals out of control when Kristinia and Briana nearly come to blows; Romeo and Angela discuss their relationship; Angela drops a bomb on her and Vanessa's business plan; on the brink of destruction, Boogie checks into rehab.

programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop
programme.desc: Boogie's intervention spirals out of control when Kristinia and Briana nearly come to blows; Romeo and Angela discuss their relationship; Angela drops a bomb on her and Vanessa's business plan; on the brink of destruction, Boogie checks into rehab.

programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop
programme.desc: Pepa's son, Tyran, comes to town with old baggage in tow; Tyran interrogates Egypt's boyfriend, Sam; drama ensues at a welcome party for Tyran; Master P is blindsided when he discovers that his incarcerated brother has gone on a hunger strike.

programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop
programme.desc: The danger surrounding Master P's incarcerated brother comes to a head; Tee Tee plays cupid for Briana, but her grand plan backfires; Tyran struggles to get Pepa's attention; after a blowup, Angela and Vanessa must unite for charity.

programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop
programme.desc: Boogie is released from rehab and temptation strikes; Master P mentors the guys on a camping trip; family therapy with Pepa and her son, Tyran, bursts into flames; Kristinia meets her cousin Kyndall, El DeBarge's daughter, for the first time.

programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop
programme.sub-title: Tee Tee With the Good Hair
programme.desc: Angela and her siblings talk about marriage; Tee Tee goes on a first date with Romeo; Tee Tee's hair event sparks trouble when Kristinia's cousin, Kyndall, and her enemy, Briana, face off; since their fight-night blowup, Pepa and Dame reunite.

programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop
programme.desc: Marriage is on the radar; JoJo is pressed to make a proposal; Romeo is torn between Angela and Tee Tee; Egypt's bikini shoot takes a turn when her boyfriend, Sam, tries to take over; drama ensues when Pepa checks Egypt.

programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop
programme.sub-title: What Heirs in Vegas, Stays in Vegas
programme.desc: Kristinia moves to Sin City and throws a welcome party; the rivalry between Briana and Kristinia comes to a head; Romeo blindsides Tee Tee when he reveals he has a secret crush on another woman; panic strikes when Egypt and Sam run off to elope.

programme.title: Growing Up Hip Hop

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: City of Death
programme.desc: (1/4) While on holiday in Paris, the Doctor and Romana experience a time distortion.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: City of Death
programme.desc: (2/4) Scarlioni is planning to steal the Mona Lisa. Yet he has six in his cellar - all genuine.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: City of Death
programme.desc: (3/4) Count Scarlioni is really Scaroth, last of the Jagaroth.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: City of Death
programme.desc: (4/4) Scaroth intends to travel back in time to save his own people from destruction.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Meglos
programme.desc: (1/4) Meglos plans to steal the ancient and powerful Dodecahedron from Tigella.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Meglos
programme.desc: (2/4) Posing as the Doctor, Meglos penetrates the underground city of Tigella.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Meglos
programme.desc: (3/4) Meglos escapes with the Dodecahedron and the Doctor is mistakenly held responsible.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Meglos
programme.desc: (4/4) The Doctor must prevent Meglos from using the dodecahedron to destroy Tigella.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Horns of Nimon
programme.desc: (1/4) With the TARDIS disabled, the Doctor is powerless to act when Romana is kidnapped.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Horns of Nimon
programme.desc: (2/4) The Doctor attempts to repair the TARDIS so that he can come to Romana's rescue.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Horns of Nimon
programme.desc: (3/4) The Doctor and Romana suspect that the Nimon are a small part of a large invasion.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Horns of Nimon
programme.desc: (3/4) The Doctor and Romana suspect that the Nimon are a small part of a large invasion.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Horns of Nimon
programme.desc: (4/4) On Crinoth, Romana discovers the truth behind the Nimon's empty promises.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Leisure Hive
programme.desc: (1/4) The Doctor and Romana visit the Leisure Hive, a tourist attraction on the planet Argolis.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Leisure Hive
programme.desc: (2/4) The Doctor and Romana track down the cause of the mysterious deaths at the Leisure Hive.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Leisure Hive
programme.desc: (3/4) The Tachyon Recreation Generator ages the Doctor into a white haired old man.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Leisure Hive
programme.desc: (4/4) The obsessed Pangol is determined to give Argolis a future and strike back at the Foamasi.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sontaran Experiment
programme.desc: (1/2) Arriving on Earth, the Doctor, Harry and Sarah meet a group of stranded human colonists.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sontaran Experiment
programme.desc: (2/2) Sarah has been captured by Styre who is conducting experiments on the captured humans.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Destiny of the Daleks
programme.desc: (1/4) The TARDIS lands on the old Dalek homeworld of Skaro.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Destiny of the Daleks
programme.desc: (2/4) Romana is captured and interrogated by the Daleks whilst the Doctor meets the Movellans.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Destiny of the Daleks
programme.desc: (3/4) Davros has awoken from his centuries long slumber and is taken prisoner by the Doctor.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Destiny of the Daleks
programme.desc: (4/4) The Doctor discovers that the Daleks need Davros to break the stalemate in their war with the Movellans.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Hand of Fear
programme.desc: (1/4) Sarah finds a mysterious fossilised hand, which re-grows and begins to move.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Hand of Fear
programme.desc: (2/4) The hand builds power and reacts to nuclear radiation, causing an overload situation.

programme.title: Crimes Of The Century
programme.desc: In 1980, the world was shocked by the murder of former Beatle John Lennon. Was Mark Chapman a cold-blooded killer or a seriously deranged young man? The lives of both men are reviewed to set the scene through interviews and footage.

programme.title: Crimes Of The Century
programme.desc: Andrea Yates drowns her five children in the bathtub to save them from Satan.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A navy lieutenant is murdered while deployed out to sea; arsenic poisoning is the cause of death; investigators discover he had more than his fair share of enemies, but it takes years before investigators discover what really happened to him.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A building manager finds the lifeless body of a young woman in the bathtub; when questioned, an ex-con living downstairs lies to police; the lies do not prove murder and the case goes cold, then a new forensic tool examines the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A murder victim's final moments are caught on tape; the crime scene looks like a clear robbery-murder; text evidence at first points to a jilted lover, but police identify a second suspect with a motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A wounded woman calls 911; her husband, who wants a divorce, gets a hard look from police, but he has an airtight alibi during the murder; forensic science of ballistics draws a direct connection.
